title: cleisostoma rolfeanum
intro: Cleisostoma rolfeanum is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, specifically found in the tropical regions of China, India, and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleisostoma rolfeanum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Cleisostoma rolfeanum often involve drying and grinding the plant's roots and leaves, which are then used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
